title: Approval status chip
notes: Colored HeroUI Chip for approval instance status. Consumed by the list screen (row-level) and show screen (header-level). Never uses raw class strings — variant is chosen from the closed 'variant' prop set.
Icon comes from heroicons via @academorix/ui/icons — no icon in the props means no leading icon.

root.propsExpr: { size: props.size || 'sm', variant: mapping[props.status].variant, leadingIcon: mapping[props.status].icon, children: mapping[props.status].label }
